case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. GLENDA PATRICIA FIGUEROA CALLES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $617.35 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALLES, GLENDA PATRICIA FIGUEROA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-16-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTGLENDA PATRICIA FIGUEROA CALLES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GLENDA PATRICIA FIGUEROA CALLES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINEUD TO OCT-16, 2019 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
